title: BULA SMP
description: Modpack for BULA SMP server. Performance, QOL and visual fidelity improving mods. This modpack is Tailored specifically for use on BULA SMP.
body:
# BULA SMP MODPACK
## General information
This is a modpack tailored for use on the BULA SMP Server.

The aim of this modpack is to improve client performance, quality of life changes and to enable serverside features like Distant horizons and Simple Voicechat, all while maintaining the vanilla feel.
